name: AirConnect
short_desc: Use AirPlay to stream to UPnP/Sonos & Chromecast devices
author: philippe44
description: AirConnect bridges AirPlay with UPnP/Sonos and Google Cast (Chromecast) devices, letting you stream audio from your iPhone, iPad, or Mac to speakers that don't natively support AirPlay.

form_fields.label: AirCast (Chromecast) arguments — set to 'kill' to disable
AirUPnP (Sonos/UPnP) arguments — set to 'kill' to disable
